global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a solid background and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares with a call to action.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and an oval shape in a lighter shade of teal, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle in a contrasting color, placed within the geometric shapes.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape, lightly outlined, positioned near the bottom of the geometric shapes.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fly smarter Special fares today' located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' in large, bold black font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Order now' centered at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with geometric shapes, promotional text and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by geometric shapes in the center, with body text and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter Special fares today, WayPoint, Order now
